{{Infobox group
| name = Silverlords
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Silverlords Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Silverlords are an elite and highly individualistic organization of powerful figures, often identified by the silver crowns they wear. They function as conquerors who gather armies from the worlds they subdue, frequently stripping [[Iterations]] of their resources and personnel. Despite their individualistic nature, they operate with significant coordination, capable of chanting in unison to harness the energy systems of plundered worlds for massive attacks. They are known to use portals for movement and can deploy specialized assets, such as assassins or unique weapons like star-sized [[diamond]] chains. In terms of power, Silverlords are considered formidable even by the standards of [[Judges]]. They are capable of coordinating large-scale sieges, such as attacking primary planets or maintaining blockades around entire sectors. While some members may be considered expendable by the organization, they often work in concert to overwhelm targets with sheer numbers and combined willpower. They have been known to partner with other forces, such as the [[Vroshir]], and maintain a presence that can intimidate even powerful beings. A common saying among [[Judges]] suggests that their numbers are vast, noting that there are always more Silverlords.}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Silverlords]] gather armies from the worlds they conquer.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Silverlords]] are platinum-crowned men and women who coordinate synchronized bombardments.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c1">''Bloodline'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Silverlords]] are elites and powerful figures even by the standards of [[Judges]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A saying among [[Judges]] is that there are always more [[Silverlords]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c1" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Silverlords]] can use silver crowns and serpentine runes to call on energy systems of plundered worlds.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Silverlords]] tear open portals into the Void.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Some [[Silverlords]] had served a term in [[Haven]] before.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Silverlords]] are longtime partners to the [[Vroshir]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Silverlords]] were opposing [[Suriel]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Silverlords]] delivered two prisoners to [[the Mad King]]'s group in the Void.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Markuth]]'s techniques are the ones he would use against [[Silverlords]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A Silverlord is a powerful being that cannot be fought.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Silverlords have taken control of [[Threshold]] to hold the realm for ransom. A single Silverlord, appearing as a raven crowned in a silver halo, currently maintains this hold while at least a dozen more remain in reserve. Although this individual was struck by black fire, she is viewed as expendable by her peers. With fifteen Silverlords concentrated near [[Lindon]], the [[Reaper]] may attempt to bargain with them for the release of the realm. During these events, [[Jek’nan]] begins to feel more like a Silverlord than an [[Abidan]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Jek’nan]] feels more like a Silverlord than an [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Silverlords]] are holding [[Threshold]] for ransom.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|There is currently one Silverlord holding [[Threshold]] with at least a dozen more in reserve.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Reaper]] may intend to bargain with the Silverlord for the release of [[Threshold]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Silverlord is a woman crowned in a silver halo.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Silverlord was struck by black fire.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Silverlord is considered expendable by other [[Silverlords]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|There are fifteen [[Silverlords]] concentrated near [[Lindon]] in [[Threshold]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Silverlord is a raven.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A saying passed down among Judges: “There are always more Silverlords.”<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
